primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: geometric ellipse description reinterpreted as universal force law
primitive_reasons.dim_shift: scope extended from terrestrial falling bodies to cosmological/planetary scale

notes: Newton 把 Kepler 的几何描述提升为力学因果机制，是概念层的重新解读而非单纯改名

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: Lorentz covariance promoted from EM-specific symmetry to universal spacetime principle
primitive_reasons.boundary_rewrite: Galilean spacetime structure replaced by Minkowski geometry

notes: 时空结构的根本改写，相当于改了整个理论的边界假设

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: biological fitness → market profit, reproduction → imitation, while preserving variation-selection dynamics

notes: 结构（选择动力学）保留，本体论层面替换

primitive_reasons.variable_rename: log-counting formula identical, units change J/K → bits
primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: physical microstates reinterpreted as abstract symbol probabilities

notes: 公式形式几乎一致，但语义从物理态变成信息态，超过纯改名

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: spins → neurons, couplings → synapses, energy minima → stored memories

notes: Hamiltonian 结构保留，每个变量重新解读

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: populations → concentrations, predation → autocatalytic chemical rate

notes: ODE 结构同构，元素完全替换

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: horizon area → entropy, surface gravity → temperature
primitive_reasons.dim_shift: entropy scales with area (D-1) instead of volume (D), holographic dimensional reduction

notes: Bekenstein-Hawking 的核心创新就是面积律，明确的维度变化

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: energy flux cascade → volatility cascade, preserving multifractal scaling laws

notes: 多尺度级联结构同构

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: quantum tunneling probability → thermal Metropolis acceptance, energy landscape → cost function
primitive_reasons.stochastic_toggle: deterministic quantum amplitude replaced by explicit thermal random sampling

notes: 量子语义换成经典随机过程

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: neutral mutation rate reinterpreted as a clock/timing device
primitive_reasons.time_scaling: statistical accumulation rate promoted to long-timescale dating tool

notes: 把统计性质用作时间标尺

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: biological infection → social exposure, R0 → influence coefficient

notes: 拓扑从均匀池改成网络是边界重写

primitive_reasons.time_scaling: static equilibrium concept gains evolutionary dynamics (replicator equation)

notes: 从静态均衡到动态演化的时间尺度引入

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: particle trajectories → field configurations under same least-action principle
primitive_reasons.dim_shift: finite degrees of freedom → infinite (continuum field)

notes: 从有限自由度到场（无穷自由度）的维度提升

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: concrete geometric symmetry operations abstracted into group elements; conserved quantities → group invariants

notes: 从具体几何抽象到代数结构

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: chemical concentrations → firing rates, catalyst → correlation, preserving positive feedback kernel

notes: 正反馈核心保留

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: classical wave equation → matter wave equation; frequencies → energy levels via E=hν
primitive_reasons.boundary_rewrite: cavity boundary conditions become atomic quantization conditions

notes: 驻波模式→量子化能级，边界条件直接成为量子化条件

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: energy → utility, particle conservation → budget constraints, while preserving fixed-point existence proofs

notes: 数学结构（不动点）保留，物理量被效用量替换

primitive_reasons.other: wave-particle duality is a categorical/ontological reframing rather than a mathematical transformation between two formulations

notes: 案例本身明确说这是'categorical rather than mathematical'，8 个原语都不太贴合

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: symbolic priors → neural network outputs, posterior update structure preserved
primitive_reasons.continuity_toggle: analytic integration replaced by variational/sampling approximation (continuous Bayes → discrete computation)

notes: 积分变近似采样，可视为连续/离散切换

primitive_reasons.concept_transfer: single oscillator reinterpreted as field mode, ladder algebra preserved
primitive_reasons.dim_shift: single DoF → infinite collection indexed by momentum k
primitive_reasons.continuity_toggle: discrete oscillator → continuum field of oscillators

notes: 局部结构提升为分布式场，是典型的维度扩展
